{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220759558FFB6731860A7754AC14"}"},"total":839},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583152789457191742","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"难得的一本恐怖小说，前期收黑伞那里有点尬，其他的看到现在都感觉超预期的好，不时会有点搞笑来中和气氛也很赞。恐怖方面的描述可以给十分。","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"恐怖小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741375957754AC14%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227583152789457191742%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227469800218179947544%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765593365,"group_id":"7469800218179947544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6RJ27nxcIb9CDH68+2/jx5XwPIN5BM2V8iECpmPEjGb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1225331739730889","user_name":"黄、桃罐头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1225331739730889","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469800218179947544","book_info":{"abstract":"【反套路+无限流+无女主+微恐】

“王队，我明明已经将她下葬了，却……却又在后院看到了她！”
“她是怎么死的？”
“不关我的事，她……她是自杀！”
“她，她只是不想火化而已……”
“那……后院的那个她是什么东西？”
“我，我不知道。”
“她能不能看到我们，听不听得到我们的声音？”
“还有，她有没有攻击性？”
……
“对于鬼，我给大家的只有一条忠告……”
“如果你不小心碰见了它，请一定不要害怕！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/59753d08d0b79cc0a4d9897ebe9aaa15","author":"脚震震","author_id":"","book_id":"7469800218179947544","book_name":"请不要害怕","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7469800220998517272","read_count":"18137","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1187847"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"549","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,无限流,灵异,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oed7632add1388dff6f82862c78e81752~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321595&x-signature=zWvw7UX69RJjG32EZbeSD39%2F6dI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3091449038249564","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"398"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220759558FFB6731860A7754AC14"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读23小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":56149,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":81988,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8285},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7591387906867954456","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"绝对正儿八经的无限流好书，角色刻画到位，幽默不低俗，剧情紧凑不水文，文章功底很强，不是小白文，而且作者写这本书绝对是有大纲的，前期写的一些东西后期或者绝境包用的到，总之很不错，看我阅读时长，还有我最近看的几本书，你就知道兄弟绝对找的书都不错，这本也是，就是在读有点少，穷哥们兜里没啥币，给推荐推荐吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767510706,"group_id":"7469800218179947544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"慢慢变好尽量做到不俗","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwlh9hTbnvgjLL6xqlCvS97jQukgN45vDUd+IwF7tDfG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/467576fb29f84bd1810bd9c2e025657c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701432&x-signature=ZAXH65zMbj2pOBBr79ucjZPEeUI%3D","user_id":"3553233136001998","user_name":"LiuNTe"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3553233136001998","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469800218179947544","book_info":{"abstract":"【反套路+无限流+无女主+微恐】

hor_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593015736740315928","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，里面的异物也好，鬼怪也罢，真的有了“鬼”的感觉，而不是烂大街到处都一样的“规则”，那种的也有好看的，但总感觉“鬼”不再像鬼，像编码，程序，就是单纯的NPC运转，这篇里面的鬼就更真实，形形色色，也多了更多角度，不同样的鬼，真实感也就随之更高了。总体逻辑清晰，内容新颖，一定程度上脱离了传统无限流，人物也挺有个人特色，相对饱满，值得推荐","text_exts":[{"e":82,"s":79,"text":"NPC","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=NPC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741375957754AC14%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593015736740315928%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227469800218179947544%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22NPC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767889971,"group_id":"7469800218179947544","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"就是爱看","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyymFvZSrrgwUEKgZqQOEnFurceNAgVw+ksu0ukwdJzZ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f3a5edf585443b2b7cedb6e778b0576~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707889&x-signature=k8S7Tgmv8xWDSB3aFRUD7WU2cdE%3D","user_id":"2001532605170781","user_name":"xliz-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2001532605170781","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7469800218179947544","book_info":{"abstract":"【反套路+无限流+无女主+微恐】
